title: ricoshot
description:
A Minecraft mod that lets you throw gold nugget in the air and shoot them with a bow. 

You can also block with your shield to parry attacks.
body:
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Join%20Discord-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/k8jWAy3Zar)
[![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support%20Me-Ko--fi-FF5E5B?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/zigqora)
[![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/badge/Subscribe-YouTube-FF0000?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&logoColor=white)](https://youtube.com/@zigqora)
[![Follow on X](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20Me-X-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=x&logoColor=white)](https://x.com/zigqora)

**Ricoshot is a Minecraft mod inspired by the game ULTRAKILL. It adds unique trick shots and shield parrying mechanics to the game.**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mUn1otsUiu0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Features:
* Coin Tossing: Hold a gold nugget in your off-hand and a bow in your main hand. Right-click to throw a coin!
* Ricoshot: Shoot the coin in the air with a bow. Your arrow will bounce off the coin and instantly hit the nearest monster. 
* Perfect Timing: If you shoot the coin at the exact moment it chimes and sparkles at its peak, you trigger an Ultraricoshot with special chimes and visual flashes.
* Shield Parry: Block at the perfect moment with your shield to completely deflect hits, using up a small amount of shield durability.
* Mod Menu Integration:You can now access the Ricoshot settings screen right from your main menu or pause screen to customize range and damage.
